ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026.  New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026.  New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.

 New on GeM 
03

ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Newspaper & Magazine Supply Service (Version 2)” is now live and the old version has been discontinued for procurement. Service Providers are advised to create their offerings under the new version at earliest GeM is linked with TReDS Exchanges for sharing CPSE purchases from MSMEs with financiers, encouraging cheaper and quicker financing. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026. For details, please click the banner on GeM website homepage Dear sellers, GeM takes strict actions against the errant sellers.Don’t indulge in Bid Rigging, Cartelisation, tinkering, bypassing or any type of collusion.
